channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: The Other China Flash Point
item.description: When imagining how the U.S.-Chinese relationship might devolve into war, experts often cite Taiwan as the most obvious flash point. In Foreign Affairs, Henrietta Levin argues that, like Taiwan, the South China Sea could spark a U.S.-China war.
